**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Yangzhou Teweis Electromechanical Equipment Technology Co., Ltd. presents a profile of an extremely nomadic micro-enterprise. Initially founded as 'Shanxi Zhiqi Technology' and later 'Shanxi Teweis' (with a Shanxi provincial-level USCC 91149900), it then relocated to Changzhou (Jiangsu) before settling in Yangzhou's Hanjiang District. Operating out of an economic development zone tech park with just 1 insured employee and a paid-in capital of ~510,000 RMB, it functions more as an engineering design, consulting, or trading 'shell' rather than a heavy manufacturer. Its incredibly broad business scope—covering everything from CNC machines, motors, and generators to sanitary ceramics and household appliances—further underscores its role as a flexible trading intermediary or a very small-scale system integrator/R&D node rather than a specialized factory.
